name: MossyMesh
tagline: Asynchronous, censorship-resistant, serverless supercomputer & open-source chess PoC
mission: Build a self-healing mesh that turns phones, Raspberry Pis, PCs, and LoRa radios into a unified, decentralized compute grid operating independently of traditional ISPs, DNS servers, and fiat currencies.

poc.name: Offline-capable chess
poc.purpose: Stress-test perfect state-transition determinism across heterogeneous hardware

slas.name: Edge ledger footprint
slas.target: ≤ 10 MB active ledger on edge devices

slas.name: Job reliability
slas.target: < 5% job timeout rate in unstable RF environments

slas.name: Capacity
slas.target: 100 RVCH/day per 20-node island with zero upstream internet

slas.name: Decentralization
slas.target: No centralized DNS/IP/cloud DB as control plane
